name: Thornspitter
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Critical Strike. Priority Fire. Deal 7 damage twice, first.
flavor_text: Named by the only crew who lived through the first test. They never loaded another.

name: Heart Lance
effect_text: Critical Strike. Overflow Fire. Hull Drain. Deal 16; heals you for damage dealt.
flavor_text: Takes something small from the target. Carries it home in the capacitor.

name: The Long Goodbye
effect_text: Radiation Leak. Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Deal 16; 5 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: The round arrives through a crack in the page. The target reads the crack later.

name: Wrath of Vael
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Breach Cascade. Deal 10 twice; adjacent take 4.
flavor_text: Vael left the fleet. Vael left this behind. The fleet kept it loaded ever since.

name: Glass Mass
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 20; adjacent 6; 4 radiation.
flavor_text: A shell of pressed glass. The pressure was the part nobody measured correctly.

name: Second Sunrise
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Critical Strike. Deal 24; excess to ship; 5 radiation.
flavor_text: A second, smaller sun, fired from a tube. The planet remembered both for a while.

name: Executioner's Oath
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Alpha Strike. Deal 12 damage twice, first.
flavor_text: Every pilot swears the oath once. Nobody swears it twice. The oath keeps its word.

name: Star Rift
effect_text: Phase Drive. Overflow Fire. Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Deal 28; adjacent 8; 6 radiation.
flavor_text: The shipyard listed this gun as scrap. The scrap yard listed it as classified.

name: Valkyrie
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: First off the rack. First through the line. First home. The pilot sings.

name: Reaper Prime
effect_text: Critical Strike. Priority Fire. Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: One pass. One target. One receipt signed in the pilot's own handwriting.

name: Silent Argo
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Phase Drive.
flavor_text: Argo never checked in. Argo never checked out. The fleet removed the logbook line quietly.

name: Orlandos the Bulwark
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Orlandos stood at the port gate. Orlandos stands there still. Orlandos is the gate.

name: Ghost of Sector 7
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Critical Strike. Phase Drive.
flavor_text: Sector 7 officially has no ship there. Every pilot disagrees, quietly, off the record.

name: Kaiserin
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Battle Hardened.
flavor_text: The flagship the other flagships salute. The kill count climbs without ever being listed.

name: The Unbroken
effect_text: Reinforced Hull. Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 3.
flavor_text: Never recorded a miss. Never recorded a loss. Never recorded a reason either.

name: Archon
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Overclock.
flavor_text: The voice on the fleet's comm that does not identify. The fleet obeys anyway.

name: The Silent Conductor
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Chain Catalyst.
flavor_text: Every gun reads the same page. Every gun turns the page together. The chord resolves.

name: The Fortress Mind
effect_text: Persistent Field. Interceptor. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: The oldest subroutine in the fleet. Still running. Still refusing to lose the hull.

name: Valen's Algorithm
effect_text: Persistent Field. Adaptive Learning. Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: Valen was an engineer. Valen left the fleet. Valen's code stayed behind, learning forever.

name: The Shepherd
effect_text: Persistent Field. Rapid Launch. Battle Hardened.
flavor_text: Counts the drones out. Counts them back. Carries the count when short.

name: Oracle of Deep Void
effect_text: Persistent Field. Probe 2 each turn. Deep Scan. Tactical Draw.
flavor_text: Reads tomorrow. Reads the week after. Writes a three-line report for the pilot.

name: Prime Directive (Unit 01)
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: The first one compiled. Still the one the fleet reruns when the briefing says 'final'.

name: Shield of the First
effect_text: Ablative Plating 2. Interceptor. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: The first shield the fleet ever welded to a hull. The hull is gone.

name: Heart Wall
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Named after a pilot who stood in the gap. Nobody walked through the gap after.

name: The Unyielding
effect_text: Reinforced Hull. Emergency Reboot. Ablative Plating 2.
flavor_text: Every bay has one. Every captain asks for it. Every captain comes home.

name: Mirror of Veena
effect_text: System Shielding. Critical Breach: deal 10 damage. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Sends the damage back where it came from. Veena asked. Veena still waits.

name: Ghost Bulwark
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Phase Drive. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Half the wall is listed on no manifest. The other half refuses to list either.

name: Phoenix Wall
effect_text: Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 3. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Goes down burning. Comes back burning. Every time, a little brighter, a little later.

name: Worldgate
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating 3. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: The last door of the last port. Nobody has walked through it uninvited.

name: Reactor Overload
effect_text: Deal 30 damage to target enemy ship. Your ship loses 10 max Hull Integrity permanently.
flavor_text: You will feel the heat in your teeth. Then nothing. Then a very quiet bridge.

name: Last Light
effect_text: Restore 25 HP to your ship. Revive all friendly Drones destroyed this turn with 1 HP.
flavor_text: A last bright minute across the fleet. Every ship returns a little less alone.

name: The Unforgiving Round
effect_text: Critical Strike. Radiation Leak. Deal 28 damage; 6 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: One shell. The engineers sign in triplicate. None of them come back to re-sign.

name: Signal to Home
effect_text: System Reset on all friendly units. Draw 3 cards.
flavor_text: A short burst on an old frequency. The fleet remembers why it started flying together.

name: Catastrophe
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Overflow Fire. Deal 35; adjacent 10; 6 radiation.
flavor_text: The shell with a name instead of a number. Named after its first firing.

name: Last Stand
effect_text: All your units gain +10 power this turn; all are destroyed at end of turn.
flavor_text: Nobody goes home. The captain said so. The captain was the first casualty.

name: Time Reverse
effect_text: Undo all damage your ship took this turn. Once per match.
flavor_text: The cockpit clock runs backwards briefly. The pilot keeps the breath and ship.

name: Final Vector
effect_text: All your Weapons gain Priority Fire, Alpha Strike, Critical Strike this turn.
flavor_text: One last clear sentence on the comm. The fleet agrees without anybody answering back.

name: Heroic Gambit
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn; deal 15 damage to each enemy unit.
flavor_text: A pilot puts the ship exactly where the bad math lives. The math rearranges.

name: Signature Scope
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Priority Fire, Critical Strike, Alpha Strike, Tracking Lock.
flavor_text: The scope from the old sniper's locker. Never returned. Never asked to be returned.

name: Valen's Harness
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Battle Hardened, Rapid Launch, Priority Fire, Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Valen wore it once. The drone wears it now, more careful than Valen ever was.

name: Iron Chorus
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your units gain +2/+2 and Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Every ship on the line hums on the same pitch. The pitch means begin.

name: Dust of Dead Stars
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Gain Stealth; at start of turn apply 2 radiation. Replaces.
flavor_text: A belt of old light and older dust. Everything flying through picks up both.

name: Gravity's Silence
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Phase Drive, Evade 30%, Reinforced Hull. Replaces.
flavor_text: A region where gravity decides not to speak. The ships inside agree politely.

name: Warmaster's Core
effect_text: Passive: Your first 2 Weapons each turn have Priority Fire and deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: The core the fleet installs on flagships. The flagships never lose while it is running.

name: Bastion Heart
effect_text: Passive: +10 starting Hull Integrity; your Defense units gain +1 defense.
flavor_text: A core beaten from an older flagship's hull. The older flagship still hums inside.

name: Oracle Core
effect_text: Passive: End Cycle: Probe 2 and Deep Scan.
flavor_text: The pilot asks the core one question each turn. The core answers early.

name: Void Traveler
effect_text: Passive: Your ship begins each match with Phase Drive for 2 turns.
flavor_text: A core that remembers the distance between here and the other place. Both places forget.

name: Reactor Pulse
effect_text: Passive: Starting turn 5, gain 1 extra energy at the start of each turn.
flavor_text: A slow heartbeat becomes a fast one. The ship does not notice. The enemy does.

name: The Resilience
effect_text: Passive: Once per match, when your ship would be destroyed, revive with 20 HP instead.
flavor_text: A core that refuses the first verdict. The second verdict is whatever the pilot writes.

name: Ghost Protocol
effect_text: Passive: All your units gain Gain Stealth for 2 turns when first deployed.
flavor_text: A core the fleet lists under a dead designation. The core keeps running anyway.

name: Swift Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Drones gain +1 attack.
flavor_text: A small core. Every wingman under it flies a little meaner without saying so.

name: Solid Core
effect_text: Passive: Your ship starts each match with +5 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: A little heavier. A little quieter. The hull sleeps a little better under its hum.

name: Recon Core
effect_text: Passive: Deploy Burst at start of match: Probe 2.
flavor_text: Reads the deck before the match starts. The pilot reads the read, calmly.

name: Strike Core
effect_text: Passive: Your first Weapon each turn deals +1 damage.
flavor_text: A tiny edge on the first trigger of the turn. The edge keeps showing up.

name: Regen Core
effect_text: Passive: Your ship gains Auto-Repair 1 each turn.
flavor_text: Small nanites on a schedule. The schedule is quieter than the fleet admits.

name: Tactical Core
effect_text: Passive: You draw 1 extra card on turns 3 and 6.
flavor_text: A core that keeps a small calendar. The calendar turns into cards on cue.

name: Boost Core
effect_text: Passive: Your next Module each turn costs 1 less energy.
flavor_text: The core that reads the expense ledger a little optimistically every turn.

name: Interceptor Core
effect_text: Passive: Your first Defense each turn gains Interceptor.
flavor_text: A small instruction for the front wall. The front wall remembers it every shift.

name: Pulse Core
effect_text: Passive: End Cycle: remove 1 extra heat from your ship.
flavor_text: A quiet fan under the reactor. The fan argues with the reactor on the ship.

name: Cycle Core
effect_text: Passive: Once per turn, you may discard a card to draw one.
flavor_text: Trades hand-card for top-card. The top does not always oblige.

name: Heat Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Overclock effects deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: The core that encourages the reactor to misbehave. The reactor is quietly flattered.

name: Scout Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Drones gain Deploy Burst: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Every little wingman arrives already reading. The pilot reads the reads, nodding.

name: Guard Core
effect_text: Passive: Your ship starts each match with +3 Hull Integrity.
flavor_text: A small extra layer somewhere under the deck. Every captain claims to know where.

name: Ambush Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Maneuver cards cost 1 less on the opponent's turn.
flavor_text: The core whose tick runs on the other pilot's turn. That pilot never notices.

name: Heavy Cargo Core
effect_text: Passive: Your ship has +2 Cargo slots.
flavor_text: A wider belly. Extra drawers. The pilot keeps secrets exactly as long as necessary.

name: Hunter Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Weapons apply Tracking Lock on their first hit each turn.
flavor_text: Writes the target's name down. The name stays written until the name is quiet.

name: Phoenix Core
effect_text: Passive: First time your ship would be destroyed, revive at 10 HP instead.
flavor_text: A small promise under the bridge. The bridge listens once. That is enough.

name: Warden Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Defense units gain Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Tells every wall on the ship to take the hit patiently. The walls obey.

name: Assassin Core
effect_text: Passive: Your first Weapon attack each turn gains Critical Strike.
flavor_text: A quiet edge on the first trigger. The first trigger is usually the last needed.

name: Sage Core
effect_text: Passive: End Cycle: Deep Scan.
flavor_text: Reads the deck slowly. Returns three cards. The pilot keeps the one that feels right.

name: Overclocked Core
effect_text: Passive: While your ship has 6 or more heat, your Weapons deal +2 damage.
flavor_text: Runs the reactor past the gauge and keeps the gauge polite about the reading.

name: Survivor Core
effect_text: Passive: When your Hull Integrity is below 50%, gain Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: A core that wakes when the ship is in trouble. Then it does not sleep.

name: Combat Core
effect_text: Passive: Your first attack each turn gains Priority Fire.
flavor_text: A small advantage at the top of every turn. The top of the turn suffices.

name: Swarm Core
effect_text: Passive: While you control 3 or more Drones, your Drones gain +1/+1.
flavor_text: A core the small ships listen to collectively. They prefer being counted in.

name: Armory Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Weapons cost 1 less energy on your first turn.
flavor_text: Opens the armory at the start of every match. Never bothers to close it again.

name: Command Core
effect_text: Passive: Your units gain +1 defense.
flavor_text: A single wire down the spine of the fleet. Every ship stands a little straighter.

name: Phase Core
effect_text: Passive: On turns 4 and 8, your ship gains Phase Drive.
flavor_text: A core that slides the ship sideways twice per match. Twice is always enough.

name: Ace Core
effect_text: Passive: When you destroy an enemy unit, gain 1 energy.
flavor_text: Turns every enemy ending into the pilot's next beginning, repeatedly, calmly.

name: Dreadnought Core
effect_text: Passive: Your ship starts each match with +10 Hull Integrity and -5 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Trades the polite refusal layer for the stubborn one. Stubborn takes longer.

name: Thermal Salvo
effect_text: Priority Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 8; 2 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: A salvo that burns on arrival and keeps burning on the manifest afterwards.

name: Matter Pike
effect_text: Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Deal 9 damage.
flavor_text: A pike that slides through the target sideways. The target does not sign for delivery.

name: Stagger Cannon
effect_text: Priority Fire. Disable. Deal 5 damage; target loses abilities next turn.
flavor_text: A cannon that knocks the enemy's rhythm sideways for exactly long enough.

name: Chorus Laser
effect_text: Linked Fire. Priority Fire. Deal 5; +2 if another Weapon fires this turn.
flavor_text: Sings with the next gun in line. The song finishes the target before verse two.

name: Peregrine Drone
effect_text: Outrider. First attack each turn does not cost your action.
flavor_text: Always first off the deck. Always first to the target. Always first home, usually.

name: Burrow Drone
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Deploy Burst: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Arrives already reading the enemy's shelf. The shelf never notices being read.

name: Warsign Drone
effect_text: Battle Hardened. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Takes the first hit. Writes it on the hull. Charges the next enemy using writing.

name: Patient Hull
effect_text: Ablative Plating 1. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Waits for the hit. Absorbs the hit. Waits again. Patience is the whole specification.

name: Ward Lattice
effect_text: Interceptor. System Shielding.
flavor_text: A grid of old promises. Every promise kept. Every hit absorbed politely and without receipts.

name: Wave Barrier
effect_text: Countermeasure 2. Evade 30%.
flavor_text: A polite wall that flickers at the wrong moment for the enemy's aim.

name: Observation Subroutine
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: Probe 1.
flavor_text: A quiet clerk in the ship's corner. Writes one line each evening, precisely.

name: Coordination Matrix
effect_text: Persistent Field. Linked Fire. Your second Weapon each turn deals +2 damage.
flavor_text: Every gun on the ship agrees to wait for the gun next door, briefly.

name: Sabot Shell
effect_text: Deal 12 damage to Hull Integrity directly; ignores Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Drops its jacket at the muzzle. Arrives already rude, already specific, already efficient.

name: Disruptor Shell
effect_text: Priority Fire. Disable up to 2 enemy units' abilities next turn.
flavor_text: A small bright argument with the enemy's control wiring. The wiring concedes, every time.

name: Fast Reverse
effect_text: Reactive. Your ship gains Phase Drive this turn; ignore the next incoming attack.
flavor_text: Stick flicks backwards. The ship follows. The attack finds the space where the ship was.

name: Crosshatch Cannon
effect_text: Flanking Fire. Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Deal 11; must be blocked by 2.
flavor_text: Four tubes at four angles. The cross finds the target regardless of its turn.

name: Glass Round
effect_text: Phase Drive. Radiation Leak. Critical Strike. Deal 16; 4 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: A round that arrives already broken. Breaks its next target on the way through anyway.

name: Lance Elite
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Outrider.
flavor_text: Carries the lance. Leads the charge. Writes the first line of the mission log.

name: Siege Lattice
effect_text: Interceptor. Ablative Plating 2. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: A lattice welded from old siege plating. Still remembers how to refuse a round, politely.

name: Master Hunter AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Tracking Lock. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Names the target. Remembers the name. Shares the name with every gun on the deck.

name: Arc Warhead
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Chain Catalyst. Overflow Fire. Deal 16; adjacent 4; next card +2.
flavor_text: A warhead that hands the next card a small advantage before it goes off.
